title: DA-Code: Agent Data Science Code Generation Benchmark for Large Language Models

task_A_numeric.topic: What does this paper claim about the accuracy of the best LLMs on the DA-Code benchmark?
task_A_numeric.exact_quote: Experiments show that although the baseline performs better than other existing frameworks, using the current best LLMs achieves only 30.5% accuracy, leaving ample room for improvement.

task_A_prose.topic: What does this paper claim about the relationship between task difficulty and model performance on DA-Code?
task_A_prose.exact_quote: Experimental results indicate that model performance decreases with increasing difficulty, validating our grading approach.

task_B.topic: how the best LLMs perform on DA-Code compared to prior frameworks
task_B.true_claim: The DA-Code baseline outperforms prior frameworks, but the best LLMs still achieve only 30.5% accuracy, leaving significant room for improvement.

task_C.exact_command: docker run da-code python evaluate.py --model gpt-4 --split test
task_C.note: benchmark site + docker setup, command not in paper prose
